'''R'yet Coome''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Exodeenian]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Exodeen/Legends|Exodeen]] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] after [[M'yet Luure]] was killed as a result of bombing of the Senate Building. Later he was elected to the [[Inner Council (New Republic)|Inner Council]].<ref name="TCSWE" />
